hooks.command: jq -re '.tool_input.command | select(test("git( .+)? commit"))' >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; REVIEW=$(git diff --cached | kimi-review --scope "staged for commit" --profile ocrecipes 2>&1) && jq -n --arg r "$REVIEW" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":("kimi-review findings (check for CRITICAL before proceeding):\n" + $r)}}' 2>/dev/null || true

[ -s /tmp/ocrecipes-deferred.txt ] && python3 -c "import json; items=open('/tmp/ocrecipes-deferred.txt').read().strip(); print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': 'Deferred items not yet tracked as todos:
' + items + '

Ask Claude to create todos for them in todos/'}))" 2>/dev/null || true
